info.title: Brand.dev API
info.description: API for retrieving brand data, web scraping, and AI-powered data extraction from any website. Previously known as Context.dev.

get.description: Retrieve logos, backdrops, colors, industry, description, and more from any domain

parameters.name: domain
parameters.description: Domain name to retrieve brand data for (e.g., 'example.com', 'google.com'). Cannot be used with name or ticker parameters.

parameters.name: force_language
parameters.description: Optional parameter to force the language of the retrieved brand data. Works with all three lookup methods.

parameters.name: maxSpeed
parameters.description: Optional parameter to optimize the API call for maximum speed. When set to true, the API will skip time-consuming operations for faster response at the cost of less comprehensive data. Works with all three lookup methods.

parameters.name: timeoutMS
parameters.description: Optional timeout in milliseconds for the request. If the request takes longer than this value, it will be aborted with a 408 status code. Maximum allowed value is 300000ms (5 minutes).

domain.description: The domain name of the brand

title.description: The title or name of the brand

description.description: A brief description of the brand

logos.description: An array of logos associated with the brand

url.description: CDN hosted url of the logo (ready for display)

mode.description: Indicates when this logo is best used: 'light' = best for light mode, 'dark' = best for dark mode, 'has_opaque_background' = can be used for either as image has its own background

colors.description: Array of colors in the logo

width.description: Width of the image in pixels

height.description: Height of the image in pixels

type.description: Type of the logo based on resolution (e.g., 'icon', 'logo')

backdrops.description: An array of backdrop images for the brand

colors.description: Array of colors in the backdrop image

width.description: Width of the image in pixels

height.description: Height of the image in pixels

socials.description: An array of social media links for the brand

url.description: URL of the social media page

stock.description: Stock market information for this brand (will be null if not a publicly traded company)

is_nsfw.description: Indicates whether the brand content is not safe for work (NSFW)

industries.description: Industry classification information for the brand

eic.description: Easy Industry Classification - array of industry and subindustry pairs

links.description: Important website links for the brand

careers.description: URL to the brand's careers or job opportunities page

privacy.description: URL to the brand's privacy policy page

terms.description: URL to the brand's terms of service or terms and conditions page

contact.description: URL to the brand's contact or contact us page

blog.description: URL to the brand's blog or news page

pricing.description: URL to the brand's pricing or plans page

error_code.description: Error code indicating the type of error
Error code indicating the type of error
Error code indicating request timeout

x-codeSamples.source:
import os
from context.dev import ContextDev

client = ContextDev(
    api_key=os.environ.get("CONTEXT_DEV_API_KEY"),  # This is the default and can be omitted
)
brand = client.brand.retrieve(
    domain="domain",
)
print(brand.brand)

require "context_dev"

context_dev = ContextDev::Client.new(api_key: "My API Key")

brand = context_dev.brand.retrieve(domain: "domain")

puts(brand)

get.summary: Retrieve brand data by company name
get.description: Retrieve brand information using a company name. This endpoint searches for the company by name and returns its brand data.

parameters.name: name
parameters.description: Company name to retrieve brand data for (e.g., 'Apple Inc', 'Microsoft Corporation'). Must be 3-30 characters.

parameters.name: force_language
parameters.description: Optional parameter to force the language of the retrieved brand data.

parameters.name: maxSpeed
parameters.description: Optional parameter to optimize the API call for maximum speed. When set to true, the API will skip time-consuming operations for faster response at the cost of less comprehensive data.

parameters.name: country_gl
parameters.description: Optional country code (GL parameter) to specify the country. This affects the geographic location used for search queries.

parameters.name: timeoutMS
parameters.description: Optional timeout in milliseconds for the request. If the request takes longer than this value, it will be aborted with a 408 status code. Maximum allowed value is 300000ms (5 minutes).

400.description: Bad Request - Invalid company name or company not found

401.description: Unauthorized - invalid or missing API key

x-codeSamples.source:
import os
from context.dev import ContextDev

client = ContextDev(
    api_key=os.environ.get("CONTEXT_DEV_API_KEY"),  # This is the default and can be omitted
)
response = client.brand.retrieve_by_name(
    name="xxx",
)
print(response.brand)

require "context_dev"

context_dev = ContextDev::Client.new(api_key: "My API Key")

response = context_dev.brand.retrieve_by_name(name: "xxx")

puts(response)

get.summary: Retrieve brand data by email address
get.description: Retrieve brand information using an email address while detecting disposable and free email addresses. This endpoint extracts the domain from the email address and returns brand data for that domain. Disposable and free email addresses (like gmail.com, yahoo.com) will throw a 422 error.

parameters.name: email
parameters.description: Email address to retrieve brand data for (e.g., 'contact@example.com'). The domain will be extracted from the email. Free email providers (gmail.com, yahoo.com, etc.) and disposable email addresses are not allowed.

parameters.name: force_language
parameters.description: Optional parameter to force the language of the retrieved brand data.

parameters.name: maxSpeed
parameters.description: Optional parameter to optimize the API call for maximum speed. When set to true, the API will skip time-consuming operations for faster response at the cost of less comprehensive data.

parameters.name: timeoutMS
parameters.description: Optional timeout in milliseconds for the request. If the request takes longer than this value, it will be aborted with a 408 status code. Maximum allowed value is 300000ms (5 minutes).

400.description: Bad Request - Invalid email or domain not found

422.description: Unprocessable Entity - Free email or disposable email detected

error_code.description: Error code indicating whether a free email provider or disposable email was detected

401.description: Unauthorized - invalid or missing API key

x-codeSamples.source:
import os
from context.dev import ContextDev

client = ContextDev(
    api_key=os.environ.get("CONTEXT_DEV_API_KEY"),  # This is the default and can be omitted
)
response = client.brand.retrieve_by_email(
    email="dev@stainless.com",
)
print(response.brand)

require "context_dev"

context_dev = ContextDev::Client.new(api_key: "My API Key")

response = context_dev.brand.retrieve_by_email(email: "dev@stainless.com")

puts(response)

get.summary: Retrieve brand data by stock ticker
get.description: Retrieve brand information using a stock ticker symbol. This endpoint looks up the company associated with the ticker and returns its brand data.

parameters.name: ticker
parameters.description: Stock ticker symbol to retrieve brand data for (e.g., 'AAPL', 'GOOGL', 'BRK.A'). Must be 1-15 characters, letters/numbers/dots only.

parameters.name: ticker_exchange
parameters.description: Optional stock exchange for the ticker. Defaults to NASDAQ if not specified.

parameters.name: force_language
parameters.description: Optional parameter to force the language of the retrieved brand data.

parameters.name: maxSpeed
parameters.description: Optional parameter to optimize the API call for maximum speed. When set to true, the API will skip time-consuming operations for faster response at the cost of less comprehensive data.

parameters.name: timeoutMS
parameters.description: Optional timeout in milliseconds for the request. If the request takes longer than this value, it will be aborted with a 408 status code. Maximum allowed value is 300000ms (5 minutes).

400.description: Bad Request - Invalid ticker or ticker not found

401.description: Unauthorized - invalid or missing API key

get.description: Retrieve brand information using an ISIN (International Securities Identification Number). This endpoint looks up the company associated with the ISIN and returns its brand data.

parameters.name: isin
parameters.description: ISIN (International Securities Identification Number) to retrieve brand data for (e.g., 'AU000000IMD5', 'US0378331005'). Must be exactly 12 characters: 2 letters followed by 9 alphanumeric characters and ending with a digit.

parameters.name: force_language
parameters.description: Optional parameter to force the language of the retrieved brand data.

parameters.name: maxSpeed
parameters.description: Optional parameter to optimize the API call for maximum speed. When set to true, the API will skip time-consuming operations for faster response at the cost of less comprehensive data.

parameters.name: timeoutMS
parameters.description: Optional timeout in milliseconds for the request. If the request takes longer than this value, it will be aborted with a 408 status code. Maximum allowed value is 300000ms (5 minutes).

400.description: Bad Request - Invalid ISIN or ISIN not found

401.description: Unauthorized - invalid or missing API key

get.description: Endpoint specially designed for platforms that want to identify transaction data by the transaction title.

parameters.name: transaction_info
parameters.description: Transaction information to identify the brand

parameters.name: force_language
parameters.description: Optional parameter to force the language of the retrieved brand data.

parameters.name: maxSpeed
parameters.description: Optional parameter to optimize the API call for maximum speed. When set to true, the API will skip time-consuming operations for faster response at the cost of less comprehensive data.

parameters.name: country_gl
parameters.description: Optional country code (GL parameter) to specify the country. This affects the geographic location used for search queries.

parameters.name: city
parameters.description: Optional city name to prioritize when searching for the brand.

parameters.name: mcc
parameters.description: Optional Merchant Category Code (MCC) to help identify the business category/industry.

parameters.name: phone
parameters.description: Optional phone number from the transaction to help verify brand match.

parameters.name: high_confidence_only
parameters.description: When set to true, the API will perform an additional verification steps to ensure the identified brand matches the transaction with high confidence. Defaults to false.

parameters.name: timeoutMS
parameters.description: Optional timeout in milliseconds for the request. If the request takes longer than this value, it will be aborted with a 408 status code. Maximum allowed value is 300000ms (5 minutes).

domain.description: The domain name of the brand

title.description: The title or name of the brand

description.description: A brief description of the brand

logos.description: An array of logos associated with the brand

url.description: CDN hosted url of the logo (ready for display)

mode.description: Indicates when this logo is best used: 'light' = best for light mode, 'dark' = best for dark mode, 'has_opaque_background' = can be used for either as image has its own background

colors.description: Array of colors in the logo

width.description: Width of the image in pixels

height.description: Height of the image in pixels

type.description: Type of the logo based on resolution (e.g., 'icon', 'logo')

backdrops.description: An array of backdrop images for the brand

colors.description: Array of colors in the backdrop image

width.description: Width of the image in pixels

height.description: Height of the image in pixels

socials.description: An array of social media links for the brand

stock.description: Stock market information for this brand (will be null if not a publicly traded company)

is_nsfw.description: Indicates whether the brand content is not safe for work (NSFW)

industries.description: Industry classification information for the brand

eic.description: Easy Industry Classification - array of industry and subindustry pairs

links.description: Important website links for the brand

careers.description: URL to the brand's careers or job opportunities page

privacy.description: URL to the brand's privacy policy page

terms.description: URL to the brand's terms of service or terms and conditions page

get.summary: Retrieve NAICS code for any brand
get.description: Endpoint to classify any brand into a 2022 NAICS code.

parameters.name: input
parameters.description: Brand domain or title to retrieve NAICS code for. If a valid domain is provided in `input`, it will be used for classification, otherwise, we will search for the brand using the provided title.

parameters.name: timeoutMS
parameters.description: Optional timeout in milliseconds for the request. If the request takes longer than this value, it will be aborted with a 408 status code. Maximum allowed value is 300000ms (5 minutes).

parameters.name: minResults
parameters.description: Minimum number of NAICS codes to return. Must be at least 1. Defaults to 1.

parameters.name: maxResults
parameters.description: Maximum number of NAICS codes to return. Must be between 1 and 10. Defaults to 5.

type.description: Industry classification type, for naics api it will be `naics`

codes.description: Array of NAICS codes and titles.

confidence.description: Confidence level for how well this NAICS code matches the company description

error_code.description: Error code indicating the type of error
Error code indicating the type of error
Error code indicating request timeout

get.summary: Retrieve simplified brand data by domain
get.description: Returns a simplified version of brand data containing only essential information: domain, title, colors, logos, and backdrops. This endpoint is optimized for faster responses and reduced data transfer.

parameters.name: domain
parameters.description: Domain name to retrieve simplified brand data for

parameters.name: timeoutMS
parameters.description: Optional timeout in milliseconds for the request. If the request takes longer than this value, it will be aborted with a 408 status code. Maximum allowed value is 300000ms (5 minutes).

domain.description: The domain name of the brand

title.description: The title or name of the brand

logos.description: An array of logos associated with the brand

url.description: CDN hosted url of the logo (ready for display)

mode.description: Indicates when this logo is best used: 'light' = best for light mode, 'dark' = best for dark mode, 'has_opaque_background' = can be used for either as image has its own background

colors.description: Array of colors in the logo

width.description: Width of the image in pixels

height.description: Height of the image in pixels

type.description: Type of the logo based on resolution (e.g., 'icon', 'logo')

backdrops.description: An array of backdrop images for the brand

colors.description: Array of colors in the backdrop image

width.description: Width of the image in pixels

height.description: Height of the image in pixels

code.description: HTTP status code of the response

error_code.description: Error code indicating the type of error
Error code indicating the type of error
Error code indicating request timeout
Error code indicating the type of error

get.summary: Extract design system and styleguide from website
get.description: Automatically extract comprehensive design system information from a brand's website including colors, typography, spacing, shadows, and UI components. Either 'domain' or 'directUrl' must be provided as a query parameter, but not both.

parameters.name: domain
parameters.description: Domain name to extract styleguide from (e.g., 'example.com', 'google.com'). The domain will be automatically normalized and validated.

parameters.name: directUrl
parameters.description: A specific URL to fetch the styleguide from directly, bypassing domain resolution (e.g., 'https://example.com/design-system').

parameters.name: timeoutMS
parameters.description: Optional timeout in milliseconds for the request. If the request takes longer than this value, it will be aborted with a 408 status code. Maximum allowed value is 300000ms (5 minutes).

parameters.name: prioritize
parameters.description: Optional parameter to prioritize screenshot capture for styleguide extraction. If 'speed', optimizes for faster capture with basic quality. If 'quality', optimizes for higher quality with longer wait times. Defaults to 'quality' if not provided.

domain.description: Domain name to extract styleguide from (e.g., 'example.com', 'google.com').

timeoutMS.description: Optional timeout in milliseconds for the request. Maximum allowed value is 300000ms (5 minutes).

prioritize.description: Optional parameter to prioritize screenshot capture. Defaults to 'quality'.

directUrl.description: A specific URL to fetch the styleguide from directly, bypassing domain resolution.

timeoutMS.description: Optional timeout in milliseconds for the request. Maximum allowed value is 300000ms (5 minutes).

prioritize.description: Optional parameter to prioritize screenshot capture. Defaults to 'quality'.

domain.description: The normalized domain that was processed

styleguide.description: Comprehensive styleguide data extracted from the website

mode.description: The primary color mode of the website design

colors.description: Primary colors used on the website

accent.description: Accent color of the website (hex format)

background.description: Background color of the website (hex format)

text.description: Text color of the website (hex format)

typography.description: Typography styles used on the website

elementSpacing.description: Spacing system used on the website

shadows.description: Shadow styles used on the website

error_code.description: Error code indicating the type of error
Error code indicating the type of error
Error code indicating request timeout
Error code indicating internal server error

get.description: Extract font information from a brand's website including font families, usage statistics, fallbacks, and element/word counts.

parameters.name: domain
parameters.description: Domain name to extract fonts from (e.g., 'example.com', 'google.com'). The domain will be automatically normalized and validated.

parameters.name: timeoutMS
parameters.description: Optional timeout in milliseconds for the request. If the request takes longer than this value, it will be aborted with a 408 status code. Maximum allowed value is 300000ms (5 minutes).

domain.description: The normalized domain that was processed

uses.description: Array of CSS selectors or element types where this font is used

num_elements.description: Number of elements using this font

num_words.description: Number of words using this font

percent_words.description: Percentage of words using this font

percent_elements.description: Percentage of elements using this font

message.description: Error message describing the validation error

error_code.description: Error code indicating input validation error

401.description: Unauthorized - Invalid or missing API key

error_code.description: Error code indicating unauthorized access

403.description: Forbidden - Insufficient permissions or usage limit exceeded

error_code.description: Error code indicating forbidden access
Error code indicating request timeout
Error code indicating internal server error

get.description: Capture a screenshot of a website. Supports both viewport (standard browser view) and full-page screenshots. Can also screenshot specific page types (login, pricing, etc.) by using heuristics to find the appropriate URL. Returns a URL to the uploaded screenshot image hosted on our CDN.

parameters.name: domain
parameters.description: Domain name to take screenshot of (e.g., 'example.com', 'google.com'). The domain will be automatically normalized and validated.

parameters.name: fullScreenshot
parameters.description: Optional parameter to determine screenshot type. If 'true', takes a full page screenshot capturing all content. If 'false' or not provided, takes a viewport screenshot (standard browser view).

parameters.name: page
parameters.description: Optional parameter to specify which page type to screenshot. If provided, the system will scrape the domain's links and use heuristics to find the most appropriate URL for the specified page type (30 supported languages). If not provided, screenshots the main domain landing page.

parameters.name: prioritize
parameters.description: Optional parameter to prioritize screenshot capture. If 'speed', optimizes for faster capture with basic quality. If 'quality', optimizes for higher quality with longer wait times. Defaults to 'quality' if not provided.

domain.description: The normalized domain that was processed

screenshot.description: Public URL of the uploaded screenshot image

screenshotType.description: Type of screenshot that was captured

error_code.description: Error code indicating the type of error
Error code indicating the type of error
Error code indicating internal server error

post.description: Use AI to extract specific data points from a brand's website. The AI will crawl the website and extract the requested information based on the provided data points.

timeoutMS.description: Optional timeout in milliseconds for the request. If the request takes longer than this value, it will be aborted with a 408 status code. Maximum allowed value is 300000ms (5 minutes).

specific_pages.description: Optional object specifying which pages to analyze

home_page.description: Whether to analyze the home page

terms_and_conditions.description: Whether to analyze the terms and conditions page

privacy_policy.description: Whether to analyze the privacy policy page

about_us.description: Whether to analyze the about us page

contact_us.description: Whether to analyze the contact us page

careers.description: Whether to analyze the careers page

faq.description: Whether to analyze the FAQ page

pricing.description: Whether to analyze the pricing page

data_to_extract.description: Array of data points to extract from the website

datapoint_name.description: Name of the data point to extract

datapoint_list_type.description: Type of items in the list when datapoint_type is 'list'. Defaults to 'string'. Use 'object' to extract an array of objects matching a schema.

datapoint_object_schema.description: Schema definition for objects when datapoint_list_type is 'object'. Provide a map of field names to their scalar types.

urls_analyzed.description: List of URLs that were analyzed

datapoint_name.description: Name of the extracted data point

datapoint_value.description: Value of the extracted data point. Can be a primitive type, an array of primitives, or an array of objects when datapoint_list_type is 'object'.

error_code.description: Error code indicating the type of error
Error code indicating the type of error
Error code indicating request timeout
Error code indicating internal server error

x-codeSamples.source:
import os
from context.dev import ContextDev

client = ContextDev(
    api_key=os.environ.get("CONTEXT_DEV_API_KEY"),  # This is the default and can be omitted
)
response = client.ai.ai_query(
    data_to_extract=[{
        "datapoint_description": "datapoint_description",
        "datapoint_example": "datapoint_example",
        "datapoint_name": "datapoint_name",
        "datapoint_type": "text",
    }],
    domain="domain",
)
print(response.data_extracted)

require "context_dev"

context_dev = ContextDev::Client.new(api_key: "My API Key")

response = context_dev.ai.ai_query(
  data_to_extract: [
    {
      datapoint_description: "datapoint_description",
      datapoint_example: "datapoint_example",
      datapoint_name: "datapoint_name",
      datapoint_type: :text
    }
  ],
  domain: "domain"
)

puts(response)

post.summary: Extract products from a brand's website
post.description: Beta feature: Extract product information from a brand's website. We will analyze the website and return a list of products with details such as name, description, image, pricing, features, and more.

maxProducts.description: Maximum number of products to extract.

timeoutMS.description: Optional timeout in milliseconds for the request. Maximum allowed value is 300000ms (5 minutes).

directUrl.description: A specific URL to use directly as the starting point for extraction without domain resolution.

maxProducts.description: Maximum number of products to extract.

timeoutMS.description: Optional timeout in milliseconds for the request. Maximum allowed value is 300000ms (5 minutes).

products.description: Array of products extracted from the website

currency.description: Currency code for the price (e.g., USD, EUR)

target_audience.description: Target audience for the product (array of strings)

images.description: URLs to product images on the page (up to 7)

error_code.description: Error code indicating the type of error
Error code indicating the type of error
Error code indicating request timeout
Error code indicating internal server error

post.summary: Extract a single product from a URL
post.description: Beta feature: Given a single URL, determines if it is a product detail page, classifies the platform/product type, and extracts the product information. Supports Amazon, TikTok Shop, Etsy, and generic ecommerce sites.

url.description: The product page URL to extract product data from.

timeoutMS.description: Optional timeout in milliseconds for the request. Maximum allowed value is 300000ms (5 minutes).

is_product_page.description: Whether the given URL is a product detail page

platform.description: The detected ecommerce platform, or null if not a product page

product.description: The extracted product data, or null if not a product page

currency.description: Currency code for the price (e.g., USD, EUR)

target_audience.description: Target audience for the product (array of strings)

images.description: URLs to product images on the page (up to 7)

error_code.description: Error code indicating the type of error
Error code indicating the type of error
Error code indicating request timeout
Error code indicating internal server error

post.summary: Prefetch brand data for a domain
post.description: Signal that you may fetch brand data for a particular domain soon to improve latency. This endpoint does not charge credits and is available for paid customers to optimize future requests. [You must be on a paid plan to use this endpoint]

domain.description: Domain name to prefetch brand data for

timeoutMS.description: Optional timeout in milliseconds for the request. If the request takes longer than this value, it will be aborted with a 408 status code. Maximum allowed value is 300000ms (5 minutes).

domain.description: The domain that was queued for prefetching

error_code.description: Error code indicating the type of error
Error code indicating the type of error
Error code indicating request timeout
Error code indicating internal server error

x-codeSamples.source:
import os
from context.dev import ContextDev

client = ContextDev(
    api_key=os.environ.get("CONTEXT_DEV_API_KEY"),  # This is the default and can be omitted
)
response = client.utility.prefetch(
    domain="domain",
)
print(response.domain)

require "context_dev"

context_dev = ContextDev::Client.new(api_key: "My API Key")

response = context_dev.utility.prefetch(domain: "domain")

puts(response)

post.description: Signal that you may fetch brand data for a particular domain soon to improve latency. This endpoint accepts an email address, extracts the domain from it, validates that it's not a disposable or free email provider, and queues the domain for prefetching. This endpoint does not charge credits and is available for paid customers to optimize future requests. [You must be on a paid plan to use this endpoint]

email.description: Email address to prefetch brand data for. The domain will be extracted from the email. Free email providers (gmail.com, yahoo.com, etc.) and disposable email addresses are not allowed.

timeoutMS.description: Optional timeout in milliseconds for the request. If the request takes longer than this value, it will be aborted with a 408 status code. Maximum allowed value is 300000ms (5 minutes).

domain.description: The domain that was queued for prefetching

error_code.description: Error code indicating the type of error
Error code indicating the type of error
Error code indicating request timeout

422.description: Unprocessable Entity - Free email or disposable email detected

error_code.description: Error code indicating whether a free email provider or disposable email was detected
Error code indicating internal server error

)

require "context_dev"

response = context_dev.utility.prefetch_by_email(email: "dev@stainless.com")

puts(response)

get.summary: Scrape raw HTML from a URL
get.description: Scrapes the given URL and returns the raw HTML content of the page. Uses automatic proxy escalation to handle blocked sites.

parameters.name: url
parameters.description: Full URL to scrape (must include http:// or https:// protocol)

html.description: Raw HTML content of the page

400.description: Bad request - Invalid URL or failed to scrape

error_code.description: Error code indicating the type of error

401.description: Unauthorized - Invalid or missing API key

error_code.description: Error code indicating unauthorized access

403.description: Forbidden - Insufficient permissions or usage limit exceeded

error_code.description: Error code indicating forbidden access
Error code indicating request timeout
Error code indicating internal server error

get.summary: Scrape URL and convert to Markdown
get.description: Scrapes the given URL, converts the HTML content to GitHub Flavored Markdown (GFM), and returns the result. Uses automatic proxy escalation to handle blocked sites.

parameters.name: url
parameters.description: Full URL to scrape and convert to markdown (must include http:// or https:// protocol)

parameters.name: includeLinks
parameters.description: Preserve hyperlinks in Markdown output

parameters.name: includeImages
parameters.description: Include image references in Markdown output

parameters.name: shortenBase64Images
parameters.description: Shorten base64-encoded image data in the Markdown output

markdown.description: Page content converted to GitHub Flavored Markdown

400.description: Bad request - Invalid URL or failed to scrape

error_code.description: Error code indicating the type of error

401.description: Unauthorized - Invalid or missing API key

error_code.description: Error code indicating unauthorized access

403.description: Forbidden - Insufficient permissions or usage limit exceeded

error_code.description: Error code indicating forbidden access
Error code indicating request timeout
Error code indicating internal server error

get.description: Scrapes all images from the given URL. Extracts images from img, svg, picture/source, link, and video elements including inline SVGs, base64 data URIs, and standard URLs.

parameters.name: url
parameters.description: Full URL to scrape images from (must include http:// or https:// protocol)

src.description: The image source - can be a URL, inline HTML (for SVGs), or a base64 data URI

element.description: The HTML element the image was found in

type.description: The type/format of the src value

alt.description: Alt text of the image, or null if not present

400.description: Bad request - Invalid URL or failed to scrape

error_code.description: Error code indicating the type of error

401.description: Unauthorized - Invalid or missing API key

error_code.description: Error code indicating unauthorized access

403.description: Forbidden - Insufficient permissions or usage limit exceeded

error_code.description: Error code indicating forbidden access
Error code indicating request timeout

get.description: Crawls the sitemap of the given domain and returns all discovered page URLs. Supports sitemap index files (recursive), parallel fetching with concurrency control, deduplication, and filters out non-page resources (images, PDFs, etc.).

parameters.name: domain
parameters.description: Domain name to crawl sitemaps for (e.g., 'example.com'). The domain will be automatically normalized and validated.

domain.description: The normalized domain that was crawled

urls.description: Array of discovered page URLs from the sitemap (max 500)

meta.description: Metadata about the sitemap crawl operation

sitemapsDiscovered.description: Total number of sitemap files discovered

sitemapsFetched.description: Number of sitemap files successfully fetched and parsed

sitemapsSkipped.description: Number of sitemap files skipped (due to errors, timeouts, or limits)

errors.description: Number of errors encountered during crawling

error_code.description: Error code indicating the type of error

401.description: Unauthorized - Invalid or missing API key

error_code.description: Error code indicating unauthorized access

403.description: Forbidden - Insufficient permissions or usage limit exceeded

error_code.description: Error code indicating forbidden access
Error code indicating request timeout
Error code indicating internal server error

domain.description: The domain name of the brand

title.description: The title or name of the brand

description.description: A brief description of the brand

logos.description: An array of logos associated with the brand

url.description: CDN hosted url of the logo (ready for display)

mode.description: Indicates when this logo is best used: 'light' = best for light mode, 'dark' = best for dark mode, 'has_opaque_background' = can be used for either as image has its own background

colors.description: Array of colors in the logo

width.description: Width of the image in pixels

height.description: Height of the image in pixels

type.description: Type of the logo based on resolution (e.g., 'icon', 'logo')

backdrops.description: An array of backdrop images for the brand

colors.description: Array of colors in the backdrop image

width.description: Width of the image in pixels

height.description: Height of the image in pixels

socials.description: An array of social media links for the brand

url.description: URL of the social media page

stock.description: Stock market information for this brand (will be null if not a publicly traded company)

is_nsfw.description: Indicates whether the brand content is not safe for work (NSFW)

industries.description: Industry classification information for the brand

eic.description: Easy Industry Classification - array of industry and subindustry pairs

links.description: Important website links for the brand

careers.description: URL to the brand's careers or job opportunities page

privacy.description: URL to the brand's privacy policy page

terms.description: URL to the brand's terms of service or terms and conditions page

contact.description: URL to the brand's contact or contact us page

blog.description: URL to the brand's blog or news page

pricing.description: URL to the brand's pricing or plans page

error_code.description: Error code indicating the type of error
